title: Linux Exfiltration Over Alternative Protocol
description: Detects data exfiltration using non-standard protocols. Attackers use tools like netcat, socat, or raw sockets to send data over TCP/UDP to external hosts, bypassing HTTP/HTTPS-based monitoring.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*nc -w*' or msg like '*nc -q*' or msg like '*ncat --send*' or msg like '*socat - TCP*' or msg like '*socat STDIN TCP*')) or ((msg like '*| nc *' or msg like '*| ncat *' or msg like '*| socat *' or msg like '*| curl -X POST*')) or ((msg like '*scp -r /*' or msg like '*scp /etc*' or msg like '*scp /var/log*' or msg like '*scp /home*')))
